item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses the requested new freezer-side confirmer as the default, identifies the repeated pattern of prior manual gates across reagent borrowing, instrument booking, and waste handoff, moves upstream to authority record/responsibility/exception-handling failures, and proposes cross-process root-cause/control reset rather than another manual check."}
